title: Giddy Guinea Pigs!
body:
## Giddy Guinea Pigs

A small mod that adds guinea pigs and enclosure decor for them! Guinea pigs can spawn in Meadows, Savannas, and Sparse Jungles.

You can tame them via,

-Seeds

-Melon Slices

-Apples

-or Veggies

<>

You can breed and heal them with the same foods.

Guinea pigs come in a variety of fun colors and patterns. There are over 200 different possible variants!

Shift-Right-Click a tamed guinea pig to make it sit down. 

Thank you to Beth for commissioning & funding this project!

[![Partner](https://i.imgur.com/oxzCr5w.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=1122)
